decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id route_m34-sbs already exists as a fully-resolved registry record with matching payload details (M34 SBS on 34th Street, Manhattan, Select Bus Service). The registry record's source_ids already include 120418_brt_cb4_34th_street and its aliases include route_m34-sbs-2012-04-18 matching the observation's local_observation_id. The observation already resolves to its own base_record_id, so decision is new per canonicalization rules.
